code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut result = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  mut out = b
  if b >= 65 and b <= 90
    out = b + 32
  else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
    out = b - 32
  end
  result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out)}"
  i = i + 1
end

println(result)
